zh.lifeSummary: 當Amaury de BEAUMONT-LE-ROGER於1145年出生在法國i萊-德-福朗斯易維林斯姆奧藍--易維林斯時，他的父親Galeran Valeran de Beaumont41歲，母親Elizabeth De Montfort23歲。他和Alix Adèle de LUZARCHES至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1195年2月享年50歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Amaury
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Cecile, Chantal, Christophe, Jean-Luc, Lucien, Marcel, Michel, Monique, Phillippe, Sylvanie.  Spanish Jose, Ruben, Carlos, Manuel, Alvaro, Antolin, Luis, Miguel, Pedro, Ramon, Roberto, Salvador.
French (mainly southern): from a regional variant of the personal name   Maurin  .
French: from a shortened form of the personal name Amaury (see Amery ).

en.lifeSummary: When Amaury de BEAUMONT-LE-ROGER was born in 1145, in Meulan-en-Yvelines, Yvelines, Île-de-France, France, his father, Galeran Valeran de Beaumont, was 41 and his mother, Elizabeth De Montfort, was 23. He had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Alix Adèle de LUZARCHES. He died in February 1195, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Amaury de BEAUMONT-LE-ROGER est né en 1145, à Meulan-en-Yvelines, Yvelines, Île-de-France, France, son père, Galeran Valeran de Beaumont, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth De Montfort, avait 23 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec Alix Adèle de LUZARCHES. Il est décédé en février 1195, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Amaury de BEAUMONT-LE-ROGER 1145 in Meulan-en-Yvelines, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Galeran Valeran de Beaumont 41 und seine Mutter Elizabeth De Montfort 23. Er hatte mit Alix Adèle de LUZARCHES mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb im Februar 1195 im Alter von 50 Jahren.

Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie con Alix Adèle de LUZARCHES. Morì nel febbraio 1195, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Amaury de BEAUMONT-LE-ROGERが1145年にフランスiレ-デ-フランスイベラインスメウラン-エン-イベラインスで生まれた時，父Galeran Valeran de Beaumontは41歳，母Elizabeth De Montfortは23歳であった。彼はAlix Adèle de LUZARCHESとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1195年2月に50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Amaury de BEAUMONT-LE-ROGER(이)가 1145년 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 이벨라이네스 우룰아--이벨라이네스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Galeran Valeran de Beaumont(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth De Montfort(은)는 23세였다. 그는 Alix Adèle de LUZARCHES(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1195년 2월 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Amaury de BEAUMONT-LE-ROGER родился в 1145 г. в местности меулан-ен-ивелаинесь, ивелаинесь, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Galeran Valeran de Beaumont было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth De Montfort, 23. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от Alix Adèle de LUZARCHES. Он умер февраль 1195 г. в возрасте 50 лет.
